tagline: Declarative Feature Engineering APIs are now available in Beta in the AWS us east 1 and us west 2 regions.
what_it_does: Declarative Feature Engineering APIs are now available in Beta in the AWS us east 1 and us west 2 regions. These APIs let you declaratively define and compute time windowed aggregation features from your data sources. With declarative feature engineering, you can: Define features in Unity Catalog.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Declarative Feature Engineering APIs are now available in Beta in the AWS us east 1 and us west 2 regions.
